name: Case Files: The Death of Paulette Williams

reviews.review_description: I was very bored, sitting and listening to the whole interview recording. It was boring and slow. Not much to look at, little interraction.. i dont recommend

reviews.review_title: Nothing too fancy, but I enjoyed it!
reviews.review_description:
I really enjoyed this game. I'm a sucker for detective games and incorporating FMV, so this really scratched an itch. The acting wasn't oscar-worthy, but nuanced enough to give you subtle clues about people's motives. The gameplay was pretty solid and enjoyable for about $10. My only complaint is there's not enough of it! There needs to be more cases and more suspects. It's a pretty straightforward game. I think my first playthrough took a little over an hour and it says I can play again and make different choices to affect the outcome!

I'd love a game built on this engine with bonus cases as DLC, some with 4-5 suspects, and some with video testimony from medical examiners or forensic experts creating a Rashomon-like narrative.
